qrScanner.torchUnavailable: Torch not available on this device
qrScanner.title: Scan QR code
qrScanner.manualEnterDesc: Enter the equipment ID from the QR label, or paste the full URL.

step1.title: Scan your first item
step1.description: Tap the blue scan button at the bottom of the screen to read a QR code. The app instantly loads the status and history.
step1.tip: The scan button is always visible at the center of the bottom bar — you can scan from any screen.

step2.title: Track equipment
step2.description: Open an item and tap 'Check out' to mark it as in your use. Tap 'Return' when done so the team knows where the equipment is.
step2.tip: Items you've checked out appear in the 'Mine' tab in the bottom navigation.

step3.title: Report issues instantly
step3.description: Found damaged equipment? Tap 'Report issue' on the item detail page. The team gets an immediate alert.
step3.tip: You can also report issues from the menu icon in the top right corner.

onboarding.step1Description: Tap the blue scan button at the bottom of the screen to read a QR code. The app instantly loads the status and history.
onboarding.step1Tip: The scan button is always visible at the center of the bottom bar — you can scan from any screen.
onboarding.step2Description: Open an item and tap 'Check out' to mark it as in your use. Tap 'Return' when done so the team knows where the equipment is.
onboarding.step2Tip: Items you've checked out appear in the 'Mine' tab in the bottom navigation.
onboarding.step3Description: Found damaged equipment? Tap 'Report issue' on the item detail page. The team gets an immediate alert.
onboarding.step3Tip: You can also report issues from the menu icon in the top right corner.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Customize your VetTrack experience
settingsPage.darkModeDescription: Reduces eye strain in low light
settingsPage.permissionDenied: Permission denied — enable in browser settings
settingsPage.subscribedDescription: This device will receive notifications even when the app is closed
settingsPage.unsubscribedDescription: Receive notifications on this device, even when the app is closed
settingsPage.testNotificationsDescription: Send a test notification to verify setup
settingsPage.techReturnRemindersDescription: Sent to the person who checked out the item (any role) when expected return time passes
settingsPage.seniorOwnRemindersDescription: Push reminder when an item you checked out exceeds expected return time (any role)
settingsPage.seniorTeamAlertsDescription: Hourly alerts about overdue equipment in the shift team
settingsPage.adminHourlySummaryDescription: Hourly consolidated alert about overdue equipment across the entire hospital
settingsPage.criticalAlertsDescription: Enable sound for urgent equipment alerts
settingsPage.resetDescription: Restore all settings to default values. This cannot be undone.

adminShiftsPage.title: Shift management
adminShiftsPage.subtitle: Import shifts from EZShift and view import history

alertsPage.title: Alerts
alertsPage.metaDescription: Active equipment alerts by severity: critical issues, overdue maintenance, sterilization reminders, and inactive equipment.
alertsPage.ackLoadFailed: Failed to load acknowledgment statuses. You can view alerts, but acknowledgment actions are temporarily disabled.

analyticsPage.title: Analytics
analyticsPage.topProblemSubMessage: Equipment with recurring issues will appear here

homePage.getStartedDescription: Add your first equipment item to start tracking

helpPage.scanQrDescription: Tap the blue scan button at the bottom to scan equipment. Instantly loads status and history.
helpPage.checkoutDescription: Open an item -> tap 'Check out'. Your name appears on the item so the team knows who has it.
helpPage.returnDescription: Open the item you took -> tap 'Return'. Removes your name and marks it as available.
helpPage.reportIssueDescription: Found damaged equipment? Open item -> tap 'Issue'. The team receives an immediate alert.
helpPage.okDescription: Equipment scanned and ready to use.
helpPage.sterilizedDescription: Item has been sterilized. Will alert when sterilization window expires.
helpPage.maintenanceDescription: Marked for maintenance. Check with admin before use.
helpPage.inactiveDescription: Item has been removed from service temporarily or permanently.
helpPage.healthRingDescription: The colored ring on each room card shows the percentage of items verified in the last 24 hours. Green >= 80%, Orange >= 40%, Red < 40%.
helpPage.syncedDescription: All items in this room have been verified in the last 24 hours.
helpPage.staleDescription: Room has not been checked in over 24 hours. Tap the room to verify items.
helpPage.auditRequiredDescription: An item in this room was flagged. A full audit is required before the room can be cleared.
helpPage.nfcDescription: Tap the NFC sticker on the room door to open the verification screen. Confirm to mark all items as verified in one tap.
helpPage.pendingDescription: Action saved locally and waiting to be sent to the server. Happens when offline. Will sync automatically when connected.
helpPage.failedDescription: Action could not sync after multiple attempts. Tap the cloud icon to view and retry.
helpPage.offlineDescription: No internet connection. The app continues to work — all changes are queued and will sync automatically.
helpPage.activeAlertsDescription: The red badge on the bell icon shows how many items need attention. Tap to view and acknowledge.
helpPage.pushAlertsDescription: Enable push notifications in Settings -> Push Notifications to receive real-time alerts even when the app is in the background.

roomRadarPage.allCheckedOutSubMessage: All items in this room are currently checked out.

roomsListPage.title: Asset radar
roomsListPage.createFirstRoomHint: Create the first room to organize equipment by location.

managementDashboardPage.title: Dashboard

managementDashboardPage.noLocationDataSubMessage: Equipment with assigned locations will appear here

qrPrintPage.title: Print QR
qrPrintPage.selectHint: Select equipment to print. You can print multiple QR codes together.

stabilityPage.title: System Stability Dashboard
stabilityPage.subtitle: Detect bugs, crashes, and performance issues
stabilityPage.noResultsHint: No test results yet. Click 'Run all tests' to start.

adminPage.noFoldersYet: No folders yet. Create one to organize your equipment.
adminPage.firstLoginUsersHint: Users will appear here the first time they sign in.
adminPage.tryOtherFilterHint: Try switching to another filter to see other users.

adminPage.shiftsSubtitle: Upload a CSV file from EZShift, review the preview, then confirm import
adminPage.noTicketsYetSub: Tickets submitted by users will appear here.
